We also used MLE estimates in Section12.2.2(page)
and encountered the problem of zero estimates owing to sparse
data (page12.2.2); but instead of add-one
smoothing, we used a mixture of two distributions to address
the problem there.
Add-one smoothing is closely related toadd-smoothing in
